message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

participant "client" as client
participant "fastAPI" as fastAPI
participant "JobsCollection" as JobsCollection
participant "Poller" as Poller
participant "IngestService" as IngestService
participant "MappingIngester" as MappingIngester
participant "MongoSerializer" as MongoSerializer
participant "DatabrokerCollections" as DatabrokerCollections
participant "SciCatIngester" as SciCatIngester
participant "Catamel" as Catamel

client --> fastAPI : file ready to ingest
activate fastAPI
fastAPI --> JobsCollection : create Job
deactivate fastAPI
activate JobsCollection
JobsCollection <.. Poller : poll for job
deactivate JobsCollection
activate Poller
Poller --> IngestService : ingest
deactivate Poller
activate IngestService
IngestService ..> MappingIngester : ingest
activate MappingIngester
MappingIngester ..> MongoSerializer : send docs
deactivate MappingIngester
activate MongoSerializer
MongoSerializer ..> DatabrokerCollections : Persist docstream
deactivate MongoSerializer
IngestService ..> SciCatIngester : ingest
activate SciCatIngester
SciCatIngester ..> Catamel : many messages
deactivate SciCatIngester
deactivate IngestService

@enduml
```
